{{documentation}}
An infobox describing a tool. This should be used for tools (e.g., [[Wooden Spade]], [[Compost Bucket]], etc.), in addition to [[Template:Infobox Item]].

==Usage==
<pre>
{{Infobox Tool
|power = tool power level
|durability = tool normal maximum durability
}}
</pre>

==Example==
<pre>
{{Infobox Tool
|power = 1
|durability = 300
}}</pre>

{{Infobox Tool
|power = 1
|durability = 300
}}

{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"power": {
			"label": "Power level",
			"description": "Power level of the tool",
			"example": "1",
			"type": "number"
		},
		"durability": {
			"label": "Durability",
			"description": "Maximum normal durability of the tool",
			"example": "700",
			"type": "number"
		}
	},
	"description": "Infobox describing a tool",
	"paramOrder": [
		"power",
		"durability"
	],
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>}}
